description: 53 - 08-01-2025 - Emails between Peter Mandelson, Lord George Robertson and others
text:
From: JCs Personal
Sent: Wed 08/01/2025 9:29:57 AM (UTC)
To: JCS (Sensitive) Personal
Subject: RE: Strategic Defence Review
Makes sense — |’ Il meet you at Reception!

JCS | Head of US Global Issues and Canada Team | US and Canada
Department | Americas and SIDS Directorate | Foreign, Commonwealth &
Development Office | E: Personal |M: Personal
From: Personal
Sent: 08 January 2025 09:29
To: JCS
Subject: RE: Strategic Defence Review

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG ONLY

HiJCS
We’ ve all got the cross Whitehall passes which have got us into FCDO before, but would be good to
need someone from your side to meet us at reception if possible?
| MA to the Defence Reviewers

Ministry of Defence
Strategic Defence Review Secretariat

Personal MOD Main Building, Whitehall, London, SW1A 2HB
Mobile: Personal

Multiuser Email: Personal

Personal Emi Personal

SECRET Email: Personal

From: JCS Personal

Sent: Wednesday, January 8, 2025 9:27 AM

To: JCS (SDR-Secretariat-Mil-SO2)
Personal

Subject: RE: Strategic Defence Review

That's great, thanks JCS . Kindly let me know which of the group will require registration at
FCDO reception and | can sort (I imagine some of you have passes that allow unescorted
access already?).

Very helpful to hear about that route on security clearances. Is Lord Robertson officially a
civil servant? The challenge we're facing is Lord M is becoming a civil servant and taking a
leave of absence from HoL in order to perform this role. Do you think this route is still
applicable on that basis?

Thanks again!

JCS

| Head of US Global Issues and Canada Team | US and Canada
Department | Americas and SIDS Directorate | Foreign, Commonwealth &
Development Office | E: Personal |M: Personal

175

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG ONLY

From: Personal
Sent: 08 January 2025 09:18
to: JCS Personal

Subject: RE: Strategic Defence Review

Sounds good JCS thanks. And no issues on the security side. We’ Il get to the FCDO reception for
1020 16 Jan. |’ Il confirm the team sheet shortly.
Just a thought, but Lord Robertson (as a member of the house of lords) hold parliamentary privilege
and so did not / does not require any vetting. He was granted Personal clearance on this basis (all
confirmed by the cabinet office). Essentially, it’ s the same as if he were a minister (they also don’ t
require SC/DV). All he needed was a STRAP brief. Might be worth exploring this avenue for Lord
Mandelson..?

JCS

| MA to the Defence Reviewers
Ministry of Defence
Strateaic Defence Review Secretariat
Personal — MOD Main Building, Whitehall, London, SW1A 2HB
Mobile: Personal

Multiuser Email: Personal

Personal Emai Personal

SECRET Email: Personal

From: JCS Personal

Sent: Tuesday, January 7, 2025 7:16 PM

To: JCS (SDR-Secretariat-Mil-SO2)
Personal

Subject: RE: Strategic Defence Review

Hi JCS , that would be great. Should we say 10:30 start?
And just to flag that we are still waiting for Lord M’s security clearances. We have agreed he
can discuss/see material up to SECRET for now in KCS. Hope that won’t be an impediment
for this discussion?
Thanks,
JCS

| Head of US Global Issues and Canada Team | US and Canada
Department | Americas and SIDS Directorate | Foreign, Commonwealth &

Development Office | E: Personal |M: Personal
From: Personal

Sent: 07 January 2025 15:05

to: JCS Personal

Subject: RE: Strategic Defence Review

176


Dear JCS,

Forgive me, | also forgot to mention Lord Robertson will be joined by General Sir Richard Barrons and

Fiona Hill.
We gy also have one or two from our secretariat, so five in total. Would that be ok?

| MA to the Defence Reviewers
Ministry of Defence
Strateaic Defence Review Secretariat
Personal MOD Main Building, Whitehall, London, SW1A 2HB
Mobile: Kersonal
Multiuser Email: Personal
Personal Em Personal

SECRET Email: Personal

From: JCS (SDR Secretariat Mil SO2)
Sent: Tuesday, January 7, 2025 2:30 PM

To: Personal

Subject: FW: Strategic Defence Review

Dear JCS

Lord Robertson is free on Thu morning and very happy to come over to the FCDO.
What time shall he arrive?
JCS

| MA to the Defence Reviewers

Ministry of Defence
Strateaic Defence Review Secretariat
Personal . MOD Main Building, Whitehall, London, SW1A 2HB
Mobile: Kersonal
Multiuser Email: Personal

Personal

Personal

Personal

Sent: Tuesday, January 7, 2025 2:11 PM
To: JCS (SDR-Secretariat-Mil-SO2) Personal

Subject: Fwd: Strategic Defence Review
Sent from my iPhone
Begin forwarded message:

From: JCS Personal

Date: 7 January 2025 at 13:56:34 GMT

To: Peter Mandelson Personal , George Robertson
Personal

Subject: RE: Strategic Defence Review

OFFICIAL

Hi JCS ,

Would the morning of Thursday 16th January be feasible? Lord Mandelson has good
availability then. And would you like to come to the FCDO? We'd be pleased to host if

SO.

Best wishes,
Jcs

177


JCS | Head of US Global Issues and Canada Team | US and Canada Department |
Americas and SIDS Directorate | Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office | E:
Personal |m: Personal

OFFICIAL

-----Original Message-----

From: Peter Mandelson Personal
Sent: 06 January 2025 22:56

To: George Robertson Personal

ce: JCS Personal

Subject: Re: Strategic Defence Review

Thanks George. | would like to do this and! amcopyingin JCS atthe FCDO to
arrange.

Very best

Peter

Sent from my iPhone

On 6 Jan 2025, at 22:47, George Robertson Personal

wrote:

Dear Peter

Warmest congratulations on the new posting. Good appointment.

The 3 Reviewers would love to meet you before you take up the position.
Fiona Hill will be with us next week and if you had a slot then [d be very
grateful.

| think that you will be interested in the direction we are going. And it will
be hugely important in your dealings in DC.

Brings back good memories of 1997!

’mon Personal if you want a contact.

Yours

JCS

Sent from my iPhone

178


From: UKIMN FCO 
 Intelligence Policy Desk Oﬃcer GBR GOV (FCDO) Intelligence Policy Desk
Oﬃcer 
Sent: 08 January 2025 10:29 
To: 
 GBR GOV (GCHQ) 
Cc: UKIMN 
 Head of US Global Issues & Canada GBR GOV (FCDO) Head of US Global Issues &
Canada <
Subject: HMA-Designate Washington 
Classiﬁcation: UK SECRET UK EYES ONLY 
,
The US desk has received the below request from Lord Mandelson (HMA-Designate Washington) 
to meet with Director GCHQ and CEO NCSC. I would be grateful if you can pass onto your Private 
Oﬃce so 
 can help set up the meeting.
STARTS 
Lord Mandelson, HMA-Designate Washington, wishes to meet Director GCHQ and CEO NCSC in 
January prior to his posting to Washington. He is eager to learn more about your cooperate with 
the US Intelligence Community and understand how he can best support your objectives from the 
Embassy – where he will 
. He will of course come into regular contact with intelligence work in 
his role and he is clear that he wants to ensure UK-US cooperation in this essential area remains 
deep with the incoming administration. He would be pleased to travel to your oﬃce, or host you at 
the FCDO. He intends to meet the other Agency Heads too. 
ENDS 
Many thanks, 
 (he/him) | Intelligence Policy Desk Oﬃcer | Intelligence Policy Department | National
Security Directorate |
parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
